name: Patient Case
history: Strained relationships with parents and a history of feeling judged and disapproved of. Mother's health condition mentioned. Issues related to parental support during education. Mentions of the mother being described as 'broken' and allegations of a past affair.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't meet my parents' expectations, I will be judged and disapproved of.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough to be accepted by my parents.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of family gatherings, seeking approval through achievements.
situation: Preparing to attend a Father's Day lunch with parents.
auto_thought: They will judge me and find something wrong with me.
behavior: Reluctance to attend the lunch, feeling tense and apprehensive.
